scripts.test: npm run test:run && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:watch: concurrently "npm run test --workspace=@vivd/backend" "npm run test --workspace=@vivd/frontend" "npm run test --workspace=@vivd/scraper"
scripts.test:run: npm run test:run --workspace=@vivd/backend && npm run test:run --workspace=@vivd/frontend && npm run test:run --workspace=@vivd/scraper
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.gen:client: cd packages/backend && npm run generate:spec && cd ../frontend && npm run generate:client
